events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the straightedge check confirms sheave misalignment beyond manufacturer tolerance (~1/16 in/ft, ~0.5° angular); since belts aren't installed yet, this is a `fail` — hold installation, correct via shimming/repositioning and re-torquing the sheave mounts, and re-verify alignment before installing/tensioning belts, since running belts over a misaligned drive would cause premature wear, vibration, and bearing side-loading.
